ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last password reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the command type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Text of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined the session */,
  "leave_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user left the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command history entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "history_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the history entry */,
  "history_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., executed, modified, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command error entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_termination_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each termination reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the termination reason */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the termination reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_terminations" (
  "termination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session termination entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the termination reason */,
  "termination_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session termination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("termination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_terminations_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES session_termination_reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_types_commands" (
  "command_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command type association entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_types_commands_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES command_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_tags_types" (
  "tag_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session tag type association entry */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_tags_types_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES command_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_tags_types_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES session_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_session_logs" (
  "user_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user log entry */,
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user session */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Text of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_session_logs_user_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("user_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command audit entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the audit entry */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., executed, reviewed, approved) */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_audits_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command dependency entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "dependent_command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command that this command depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command parameter entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)
